html:
Exclusive to:

The Cartographer's Desk is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Structure, introduced in A New Reign. It can be found in the Prototypers & Stations Filter and Structures Filter, requires a Compass, and four Boards to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. The Cartographer's Desk can be used to access the Cartography Filter and craft Map Scrolls. The Cartographer's Desk grants the ability to add what others have already discovered on the Map.

The Cartographer's Desk also has the ability to erase Blueprints, Tackle Adverts, Sketches, Costume Patterns, Recipe Cards, and Lost Scrapbook Pages turning them into one Papyrus, each.

Tips

  • If the Map Scroll is created on the surface, it will not transfer any Caves map data and vice versa.
  • The Cartographer's Desk tends to be more useful on servers with larger maps.
  • There are Mods that make the Cartographer's Desk and Map Scrolls redundant. Therefore, players should be cautious on modded servers to avoid building redundant structures.

Trivia

  • The Cartographer's Desk was added in the A Little Fixer Upper update.
  • Cartography is the science and practice of making maps. A person who makes maps is called a cartographer.

Gallery

  • A burnt Cartographer's Desk.
  • A Cartographer's Desk and a Feather Pencil.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Cartographer's Desk
"Show everyone exactly where you've been."

Grants access to the Cartography Filter.

Can be Hammered

×1 ×4

"cartographydesk"
“Now I can show everyone what I found!”
–Wilson
“I guess I could show everyone where I've been.”
–Willow
“Friends make little pictures to help Wolfgang not get lost!”
–Wolfgang
“Maps are best with monsters drawn on the borders.”
–Wendy
“DIRECTIONAL INFORMATION TRANSMITTER FOR FLESH SIDEKICKS”
–WX-78
“Ah! A proper desk! Just look at the finish on that wood!”
–Wickerbottom
“Heh. Has a little compass and everything.”
–Woodie
“Mapmaking is a soothing pastime. Methodical.”
–Maxwell
“What legends might I find within these maps?”
–Wigfrid
“Heh heh. I was never allowed in father's study.”
–Webber
“I hope my penmanship is legible.”
–Warly
“Needs Findy Paper”
–Wormwood
“Good place to kick your feet up, if nothin' else.”
–Winona
“I could make maps to anywhere and nowhere.”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk don't need a map!”
–Wurt
“We're mapping out the wilderness!”
–Walter
“We'll be able to explore a lot faster if we map out where we've already been.”
–Wanda
The Cartographer's Desk is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Structure, introduced in A New Reign. It can be found in the Prototypers & Stations Filter and Structures Filter, requires a Compass, and four Boards to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. The Cartographer's Desk can be used to access the Cartography Filter and craft Map Scrolls. The Cartographer's Desk grants the ability to add what others have already discovered on the Map.
The Cartographer's Desk also has the ability to erase Blueprints, Tackle Adverts, Sketches, Costume Patterns, Recipe Cards, and Lost Scrapbook Pages turning them into one Papyrus, each.
Tips[edit | edit source]
If the Map Scroll is created on the surface, it will not transfer any Caves map data and vice versa.
The Cartographer's Desk tends to be more useful on servers with larger maps.
There are Mods that make the Cartographer's Desk and Map Scrolls redundant. Therefore, players should be cautious on modded servers to avoid building redundant structures.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Cartographer's Desk was added in the A Little Fixer Upper update.
Cartography is the science and practice of making maps. A person who makes maps is called a cartographer.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bàn của Người vẽ bản đồ là một Cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Cấu trúc và Bộ lọc Nguyên mẫu & Trạm, yêu cầu La bàn và bốn Ván ép để chế tạo và Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bàn của người vẽ bản đồ có thể được sử dụng để truy cập Bộ lọc bản đồ và chế tạo Cuộn bản đồ. Bàn của Người vẽ bản đồ cấp khả năng bổ sung những gì người khác đã khám phá trên Bản đồ.

The '''Cartographer's Desk''' is a ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' exclusive [[Structures|Structure]], introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It can be found in the [[Prototypers & Stations Filter]] and [[Structures Filter]], requires a [[Compass]], and four [[Boards]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. The Cartographer's Desk can be used to access the [[Cartography Filter]] and craft [[Map Scroll]]s. The Cartographer's Desk grants the ability to add what others have already discovered on the [[Map]].

The Cartographer's Desk also has the ability to erase [[Blueprint]]s, Tackle Adverts, [[Sketch|Sketches]], Costume Patterns, [[Recipe Card|Recipe Card]]s, and [[Lost Scrapbook Page]]s turning them into one [[Papyrus]], each.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* If the Map Scroll is created on the surface, it will not transfer any Caves map data and vice versa.
* The Cartographer's Desk tends to be more useful on servers with larger maps.
* There are [[Mod]]s that make the Cartographer's Desk and Map Scrolls redundant. Therefore, players should be cautious on modded servers to avoid building redundant structures.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Cartographer's Desk was added in the ''[[A New Reign#September 1, 2016 - A Little Fixer Upper|A Little Fixer Upper]]'' update.
* [[Wikipedia:Cartography|Cartography]] is the science and practice of making maps. A person who makes maps is called a cartographer.
